name: spacecraft-personality
title: What kind of spacecraft are you?
intro: A playful personality quiz that maps choices to outcomes.

options.label: Crossing deep space alone, sending back discoveries
Delivering supplies exactly when the crew needs them
Keeping a whole team alive in orbit
Fast maneuvers, high pressure, clear targets

questions.text: What do people rely on you for?

outcomes.label: Deep-space probe
outcomes.description: You are quiet, focused, and built for impossible distances.

outcomes.label: Cargo hauler
outcomes.description: You make complex plans feel boringly reliable, which is a compliment.

outcomes.label: Orbital station
outcomes.description: You are the stable center where different people and systems connect.

outcomes.label: Interceptor craft
outcomes.description: You move fast, decide cleanly, and thrive when the stakes are clear.
